input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.4.3
            TITLE: the segment/cell transport container(s) must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.4.3: The Segment/Cell Transport Container(s) must be:
EV.11.4.3 The Segment/Cell Transport Container(s) must be: 
a. Electrically insulated 
b. Protected from shock hazards and arc flash

final_answer: The Segment/Cell Transport Container(s) must be: EV.11.4.3 The Segment/Cell Transport Container(s) must be: a. Electrically insulated b. Protected from shock hazards and arc flash
